anomalies.reason: Official enode count dropped sharply from 10 to 2.
anomalies.technical_impact: A sharp drop may indicate source generation issues, infrastructure maintenance, or significant bootstrap peer removal.
anomalies.recommended_action: Preserve this snapshot and wait for the next observation before drawing a final conclusion.

anomalies.reason: 8 enodes were removed from a previous total of 10.
anomalies.technical_impact: High removal count may indicate bootstrap peer replacement or infrastructure rotation.
anomalies.recommended_action: Review removed enodes and preserve the snapshot for future report comparison.

anomalies.reason: Large rotation intensity detected: 0 added and 8 removed.
anomalies.technical_impact: High rotation intensity may suggest infrastructure maintenance, peer refresh, or node replacement.
anomalies.recommended_action: Track whether the next observations stabilize or continue rotating heavily.

anomalies.reason: Only 2 of 10 previous enodes remained unchanged.
anomalies.technical_impact: Low continuity may indicate broader peer-list replacement rather than a small refresh.
anomalies.recommended_action: Review added and removed lists to identify whether this was a broad rotation event.

report_use_notes: Use the 7D report for short-range rotation and recent watcher movement.
Use the 30D report for broader trend context once the 15-minute watcher has accumulated enough observations.
Use the All Time report for full testnet observation history preserved by this watcher.
Use JSON summaries for structured AI-assisted analysis, dashboards, and future export layers.
